creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Zsolt from comment #0)

Hi Zsolt,

I never used search plugins in qbittorrent.

When you say that they aren't working - what do you mean?
What are the steps to reproduce the problem?

In qbittorrent-nox-4.5.5_1 I tried to add https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LightDestory/qBittorrent-Search-Plugins/master/src/engines/glotorrents.py as a plugin and nothing happened.


Yuri
